name: Steve Goodman
abstract: Steven Benjamin Goodman (July 25, 1948 – September 20, 1984) was an American folk  and country singer-songwriter from Chicago. He wrote the song "City of New Orleans", which was recorded by artists including Arlo Guthrie, John Denver, Willie Nelson, and Judy Collins.

works.t: The I Don't Know Where I'm Going, But I'm Goin' Nowhere in a Hurry Blues

works_created.t: The I Don't Know Where I'm Going, But I'm Goin' Nowhere in a Hurry Blues

about_quotes.speaker: Joel Dorn
about_quotes.evidence: I started working with Asleep at the Wheel, Don McLean, Lou Rawls, Steve Goodman, Peter Allen, and I made what I think are some very interesting, very good records.
about_quotes.doc_title: Joel Dorn interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 13, 2007
